job_description:
# RCM Data Analyst (SQL & Prompt Engineering)
Company: Infomatics Corp
Source: LinkedIn; matching Dice listing found
Employment type: Contract
Checked: April 30, 2026
Posted: April 9, 2026 on LinkedIn; matching Dice result refreshed April 30, 2026
URL: https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/rcm-data-analyst-sql-prompt-engineering-at-infomatics-corp-4393838810

## Highlights
- Remote RCM analytics contract role focused on SQL, prompt development, and operational/audit use cases.
- Responsibilities include extracting and interpreting SQL data, structuring complex datasets, developing/refining prompts, and supporting data-driven business decisions.
- Requires SQL, data analysis, prompt engineering, and deep Revenue Cycle Management analytics.
strengths: Strong SQL, data analysis, healthcare revenue-cycle adjacency, audit/operational analytics, and remote-work alignment.
Prompt-development theme fits the requested search theme and can be positioned as adjacent to AI-assisted analytics learning.
Data quality and decision-support language maps to ETL validation and healthcare reporting experience.
gaps: Hands-on production prompt engineering is not established in the base resume; do not claim direct professional prompt-engineering ownership.
Deep RCM analytics is adjacent to payer/claims healthcare experience but should not be overstated.
notes: Apply if comfortable positioning prompt engineering as an emerging/adjacent skill rather than proven production experience. Tailor toward SQL, healthcare analytics, audit/operational use cases, prompt-assisted analysis, and data quality.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data Analyst | SQL Analytics | AI-Assisted Data Analysis

replacements.find: Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines.
replacements.replace: Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, Python, and AI-assisted analytics workflows while maintaining a strong foundation in SQL, healthcare data quality, and reporting validation.
